@startuml
actor AppUser
participant "Webserver" as WebServer
control OrderController
entity OrderService
database OrderDao

AppUser ->> WebServer : Update https://xxx/orders/{OrderId}?uuid=123\nOrderVO{orderId}
activate WebServer
note right of WebServer #lightgreen: 解析URL参数，\n获取订单ID和UUID信息。
deactivate WebServer

WebServer -->+ OrderController : update(OrderId) \norderVo { orderId } 
note left of OrderController #yellow:green: Controller层接收请求,\n调用service层的update方法。\ndelegate委托给业务逻辑处理类进行更新操作。
deactivate OrderController 

OrderController -->> +OrderService:update(orderid)\norervo{\orderid}\nuuid  
    note below ordercontroller#pink:red:bussiness logic layer receives request from controller.\ncalls dao's findbyprimarykey method to get data accordingto primary key id then updates corresponding record based on received parameters including new values for fields like status etc.. finally returns updated object back through serviceinterface which will be returned by this function call chain eventually after being processed at each level accordingly before sending response message containing result info such success or failure indication alongwith any error messages if applicable else just simple confirmation saying everything went fine without issues encountered during execution process so far till now since start point where user initiated action via ui component e g button click event handler attached thereto triggering entire sequence described above stepwise manner leading up final outcome desired originally intended purpose behind doing all these things together in first place anyway...    
        deactivate orderservice
        
            activate orderrdao
            
                loop while true do
                    
                    alt condition met
                        
                        exitloop
                        
                     endif
                
                 enddo
 
              deactivatordao
    
          returnupdatedobjectbacktoservicelayerwhichwillthenreturnittoitscallerandsoonuntilreachingoriginalinitiatorofthewholeprocessnamelytheenduserswhostarteditallbypressingabuttonorclickonalinketcetera......  

@enduml
